title: Smashing the Spy Ring
writer: Arthur T. Horman, Dorrell McGowan, Stuart E. McGowan
actors: Ralph Bellamy, Fay Wray, Regis Toomey
plot: Top U.S. government spy-smasher John Baxter (Ralph Bellamy) does just that as he is aided by Eleanor Dunlap (Fay Wray) and companion federal agent Ted Hall (Regis Toomey) while being highly abetted by top enemy agent Dr. L. B. Car...
